data.title: FileOnQ partners with City of Portland to distribute & support SAMS software for public safety. Empowering agencies in justice for sexual assault survivors.
data.description: In Seattle on August 25, 2025, FileOnQ, a prominent provider of public safety software, unveiled the latest addition to its lineup of solutions - SAMSOnQ. This software, originally created by the City of Portland, will now be offered and maintained by FileOnQ. This move allows for a wider distribution and support network for SAMS, bringing advanced public safety technology to more users.

data.title: First AI Web3 Media, Blockchain.News, tokenizes assets on MINAX, pioneering media assetization with AI + blockchain. (Read More)
data.description: The first AI-driven Web3 media brand, Blockchain.News, has recently been listed on MINAX. This move marks a significant step in assetizing media through the combination of AI and blockchain technology. By leveraging these innovative tools, Blockchain.News is paving the way for the tokenization of assets in the media industry. This development highlights the growing importance of merging artificial intelligence and blockchain in the digital world.
Asia's $306 Billion In Global Bond Sales Expected To Increase

data.title: Hacker linked to Coinbase buys $8M of Solana; trading activity tracked by Lookonchain amid ongoing cybercrime investigation.
data.description: Lookonchain has reported that a hacker linked to Radiant Capital and an unidentified cybercriminal have been involved in trading activities. The hacker, along with another individual, are suspected of making transactions within the market.
Alm. Brand A/S provided a weekly update on their share buybacks.

data.title: JD Vance says Russia has softened stance on Ukraine conflict, offering concessions. Sanctions still on the table.
data.description: During an interview on NBC News' "Meet the Press," Vice President J.D. Vance revealed that Russia has shown a willingness to compromise in the Ukraine conflict. This shift marks the first time in the three and a half years of the conflict that Russia has displayed flexibility on its key demands. Vance highlighted that Russia has backed away from the idea of establishing a puppet regime in Kyiv and has accepted the necessity of providing security guarantees for Ukraine's territorial integrity. Despite this progress, Vance mentioned that the possibility of imposing sanctions on Russia remains open but will be assessed on a case-by-case basis. Regarding Russian airstrikes on a U.S.-owned electronics factory, Vance condemned the actions while underscoring the imperative to end the conflict.
Gold Prices Remain Stable as Markets Anticipate September Federal Reserve Rate Cut

data.title: Lundbeck to share long-term impact data on bexicaserin for rare epilepsy treatment at upcoming congress.
data.description: The outcomes of the open label extension (OLE) from the Phase 1b/2a PACIFIC trial studying bexicaserin's effectiveness in treating patients with Developmental and Epileptic Encephalopathies (DEEs) will be unveiled for the first time at the upcoming International Epilepsy Annual Congress. This trial is crucial in examining the potential benefits of bexicaserin for individuals with DEEs, with significant findings to be shared at the conference.

data.title: First AI-Powered Web3 Media Brand, Blockchain.News, lists on MINAX, tokenizing brand equity. Redefines content value with AI & blockchain in media assetization.
data.description: The MINAX platform has announced the listing of Blockchain.News, making it the pioneering AI-powered Web3 media entity to tokenize its brand equity as on-chain assets. This significant development signals a revolutionary phase for media assetization, merging AI technology with blockchain to transform the perception of content worth, and creating worldwide possibilities for the digital content sector.

data.title: LG Innotek aims to grow its automotive communication components business into a $1.08 billion industry in 30 years with 'Next-gen Digital Key Solution'.
data.description: In South Korea, LG Innotek introduced its cutting-edge 'Next-generation Digital Key Solution' to the public during a recent event. This innovative product marks a milestone in LG Innotek's automotive technology development, showcasing their commitment to advancement in the field.

data.title: Leqembi drug (lecanemab) launched in EU today by BioArctic AB's partner Eisai, starting in Austria. Germany launch follows.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Eisai, a partner of BioArctic AB (publ) (NASDAQ Stockholm: BIOA B), initiated the launch of Leqembi in the EU, beginning in Austria. The product is also set to be introduced in Germany on September 1, 2025. Leqembi obtained approval from the European Commission for distribution.

data.title: Galan Lithium Limited completes $20M placement after successful due diligence by Clean Elements Fund, validating HMW project.
data.description: Key Points: The $20 million placement to Clean Elements Fund has met all conditions. Clean Elements Fund's due diligence confirms Hombre Muerto West (HMW) as a top-tier lithium project with significant scale and grade. This investment highlights the potential of HMW.
China’s Stock Market Has The Second Highest Turnover Ever At 3.1 Trillion Yuan .
Kazakhstan’s Oil Exports Continue Despite Ukrainian Drones Striking Russia’s Ust-Luga

data.title: US investors can now include Bitcoin in their 401(k) plans- exciting, but risky. Concerns raised about potential retirement hazards.
data.description: Investors in the United States now have the option to incorporate Bitcoin into their 401(k) retirement plans. However, there are concerns raised by some individuals regarding the potential risks associated with including the digital currency in their retirement portfolios. This move represents a significant shift in investment trends, with Bitcoin gaining popularity among those planning for retirement. The decision to include Bitcoin in these plans highlights the growing acceptance and integration of cryptocurrencies into mainstream financial systems. It will be interesting to see how this development shapes the investment strategies of individuals with an estimated $22 trillion held in 401(k) accounts.

data.title: A crypto wallet linked to ‘Coinbase hacker’ purchases $8M worth of Solana, along with other cybercriminals. Trading activities monitored by Lookonchain.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, it appears that the hacker from Radiant Capital and another unidentified cybercriminal have been engaging in market trades.

data.title: Linux Foundation embraces Agentgateway Project to speed up AI Agent adoption with focus on security, observability and governance in enterprise and multi-agent systems. Post from Amsterdam on Aug. 25, 2025, mentions it enabling reliable, governed, scalable agentic workflows.
data.description: A recent project, known as Agentgateway, has been successful in facilitating dependable, controlled, and expandable agentic processes within enterprise and multi-agent systems. This initiative was highlighted at the Open Source Summit Europe event held in Amsterdam on August 25, 2025. The project has been instrumental in enhancing the efficiency and reliability of workflows in these systems. The Linux Foundation, a nonprofit organization dedicated to fostering innovation through open source technology, presented this development. The event showcased the impact of Agentgateway in revolutionizing these systems to ensure smoother operations. This project has opened new avenues for innovation and collaboration in this space, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: Investment in open source outperforms proprietary, yielding 7-14x exits, 20-34% faster funding for founders, and 27% more community builders.
data.description: At the Open Source Summit Europe held in Amsterdam on August 25, 2025, notable statistics were revealed regarding investments in the tech industry. The data showcased a significant return on investment, with exits yielding a remarkable 7-14 times the initial investment. Furthermore, founders experienced a faster funding process, with a 20-34% decrease in the time taken to secure funds. Additionally, there was a notable increase in community builders, showing a 27% growth in individuals contributing to open-source projects. These findings highlight the positive outcomes and opportunities present in the tech investment landscape, emphasizing the impact of open-source initiatives in driving innovation and collaboration.

data.title: Baseus to launch Inspire series at IFA 2025 with Bose technology, a new standard in sound. Event from September 5-10.
data.description: A highly anticipated event is set to take place in Shenzhen, China on August 25, 2025. Baseus, a prominent player in the consumer electronics industry, is gearing up to unveil its latest line of premium audio products, known as the Inspire series. These innovative products will showcase cutting-edge Sound by Bose technology, promising a remarkable audio experience that sets a new benchmark for quality sound in the market. The debut is scheduled to happen at IFA 2025, a renowned global trade show, from September 5 to September 10. Make sure to mark your calendars and witness the beginning of a new era in accessible high-end sound.

data.title: OpenSearch Software Foundation celebrates 1-year anniversary with 78% increase in project downloads and AI advancements.
data.description: OpenSearch Software Foundation makes strides in AI development for search, observability, and analytics, with a significant 78% increase in project downloads compared to the previous year. The foundation's efforts in advancing artificial intelligence technologies were highlighted at the Open Source Summit Europe in Amsterdam on August 25, 2025. The OpenSearch Software Foundation serves as the impartial hub for the OpenSearch project, with a growing number of downloads indicating a heightened interest and adoption of these innovative solutions.
